items.title: NRC approves Diablo Canyon license renewal, extension
items.blurb: Background: Diablo Canyon’s survival has been a roller coaster ride of sorts. In 2016, PG&E announced plans to permanently shutter the plant, with original plans to shut Unit 1 down in 2024 and Unit 2 in 2025. But in…

items.title: US agency signals cooperation on Türkiye's SMR investments
items.blurb: USTDA says it could support Türkiye’s SMR investments through nuclear regulations, public projects, and private sector talks

items.title: South Korea Renews Push for Uranium Enrichment Rights as SMR Race Accelerates
